XWmaFileMediaObject::GetFileHeader

Retrieves the header information from the WMA file.

HRESULT GetFileHeader(
    WMAXMOFileHeader *pFileHeader,
);

Parameters

pFileHeader
Address of the WMAXMOFileHeader structure that receives the header information.

Return Values

Returns S_OK if successful, an error code otherwise.

Requirements

  Header: Declared in DSound.h.
